stemHtml: You are flying an aircraft at FL350 with the autopilot engaged in VNAV and LNAV modes. What are the consequences of an auto-trim failure in these conditions?

options.a: The autopilot will disconnect and the pilot flying should take the controls.
options.b: The abnormal rudder jam checklist should be performed.
options.c: An emergency descent should be initiated.
options.d: The company should be notified and advice should be seen from MCC.
